resources.string:
How to use 


 Setup 
 1. Tap [Step 1. Enable QR IME Sender].
 2. Turn on QR IME Sender in the keyboard settings.
 3. Press Back to return to this app.
 4. Tap [Step 2. Select QR IME Sender].
 5. Select QR IME Sender as the input method.


 Scan 
 1. Open the app or screen where you want to enter text. Example: Chrome.
 2. Tap the input field where the QR text should be entered.
 3. Tap [Scan QR] on the QR IME Sender keyboard.
 4. Scan the QR code.
 5. The scanned text will be entered into the selected input field.
 6. When you finish using the custom keyboard, tap [Keyboard Settings] to switch back to your previous keyboard.
Scanning failed repeatedly. Returning to the main screen.
QR IME Sender is not enabled yet.
